backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor implementing emotional check-in system with user profiles, check-in storage, supportive response generation, and access control for authenticated users.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting three debugging features for the ConversationInput component's tabbed interface, focusing on rendering, CSS visibility, and console logging.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Comprehensive summaries of all frontend files including components, hooks, pages, and utilities with emphasis on authentication, chat interface, emotional check-ins, and debugging features.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS styles with OKLCH color system variables for light/dark themes, base styling for body and borders.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with meta tags, title "Ana - Your Friend in Every Emotional Need", and root div for React mounting.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component managing authentication state, guest mode, and conditional rendering of WelcomeScreen, ChatPage, or ProfileSetupModal with React Query provider.
frontend/src/components/ConversationHist: Displays past emotional check-ins with Ana's responses in chat format, includes comprehensive console logging for debugging and speech synthesis cleanup on unmount.
frontend/src/components/ConversationInpu: Input component with emotion selector, 7-tab resource interface (Music, Dance, Stories, Self Care, Meditation, What to Watch, Journaling), textarea, voice input, and extensive console logging for debugging tab visibility issues.
Displays a list of dance and movement activity links based on the user's mood, with external link icons and hover effects.
frontend/src/components/GuestPromptBanne: Shows a dismissible banner prompting guest users to create an account to save conversations permanently, with session storage for dismiss state.
frontend/src/components/JournalingTabCon: Renders mood-specific journaling prompts in styled cards to help users process their emotions through reflection.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Main app layout component with header (logo, share button, login), main content area, and footer with Caffeine.ai attribution.
frontend/src/components/LoginButton.tsx: Handles authentication UI with login/logout functionality, loading states, and special handling for guest users.
frontend/src/components/MeditationTabCon: Displays guided meditation and mindfulness practice links tailored to the user's current emotional state.
frontend/src/components/MusicControl.tsx: Fixed-position floating controls for background music with play/pause and mute/unmute buttons with tooltips.
Shows curated music recommendations as external links based on the user's mood.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: Modal dialog for new users to enter their name during initial profile setup, with form validation and loading states.
frontend/src/components/ResourceCard.tsx: Empty component file with no content.
Displays AI responses with text-to-speech integration, showing main message, relatable story, action options, and follow-up questions in styled cards.
frontend/src/components/SelfCareTabConte: Presents practical self-care routine links tailored to the user's emotional needs with external link navigation.
frontend/src/components/StoriesTabConten: Shows story and narrative links that resonate with the user's current mood.
frontend/src/components/VoiceRecordingIn: Animated indicator showing recording status with pulsing microphone icon and audio level visualization bars.
frontend/src/components/WhatToWatchTabCo: React component that displays a list of mood-based video links with external link icons and hover effects.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that manages the backend actor instance with authentication, initializing it with Internet Identity and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useBackgroundMusic.ts: Custom hook that manages background audio playback with loop, volume control, play/pause, and mute functionality, handling autoplay restrictions.
frontend/src/hooks/useCheckIns.ts: Custom hook providing queries and mutations for check-ins with supportive responses, supporting both authenticated backend storage and guest mode via localStorage.
frontend/src/hooks/useGuestCheckIns.ts: Custom hook that manages guest check-ins in localStorage, providing add, load, and clear operations without requiring authentication.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Custom hook and context provider for Internet Identity authentication, managing login state, identity persistence, and AuthClient lifecycle.
Custom hook that wraps the Web Speech Recognition API, providing voice-to-text transcription with interim results, error handling, and browser compatibility checks.
frontend/src/hooks/useSpeechSynthesis.ts: Custom hook that wraps the Web Speech Synthesis API for text-to-speech functionality with voice selection, playback control, and detailed logging.
frontend/src/hooks/useUserProfile.ts: Provides React Query hooks for fetching and saving the current user's profile, with automatic cache invalidation on updates.
frontend/src/index.css: Defines Tailwind CSS configuration with custom warm peach/coral color scheme for light and dark modes, plus Ana's room background styling with split layout for chat interface.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query, Internet Identity provider, and renders the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/ChatPage.tsx: Main chat interface page that displays conversation history, handles new check-ins, manages background music, and shows guest prompt banner with responsive layout.
frontend/src/pages/WelcomeScreen.tsx: Landing page offering two authentication options: guest mode with local storage or Internet Identity login with permanent cloud storage.
frontend/src/utils/moodResourceLinks.ts: Provides curated music and resource links mapped to different moods (sad, happy, anxious, etc.) featuring popular artists and Spotify/YouTube playlists.
frontend/src/utils/shareHelpers.ts: Utility functions for sharing content using Web Share API with clipboard fallback, including support detection and share text generation.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utilities for extracting and managing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom color system using OKLCH color space, extended border radius variables, Inter font family, warm-toned shadow utilities, and plugins for animations and typography.
project_state.json: Project state file for 'Ana' emotional guide app tracking features, architectural notes, and known issues including non-functional share button, broken response generation, non-working voice conversation, and tabs not displaying in deployment.
